title: Iraiva Lyrics Hiphop Tamizhan
stanzas:
Iraiva Song Lyrics From Hiphop Tamizhan Album
#HipHopTamizha

Aam, indha vazhkai
oru nadaga medai
adhil nadithidum
nadigargal naam

indha vazhkai oru
puthagam endraal
adhu kooridum
paadam naam

indha vazhkayil
kadhaigalo nooru
andha kadhaigalai
naan unakku solgiren
kaelu
yeah.. yeah..
hip hop tamizha
Aadhi..

this ones for you
listen

aval peyar selvi
karka ponaal kalvi

pallikoodam pogayila
gavanam padippil illa
puthimathi solla
yaarumillai, karanam

iavalukku thaayum illai
thandhayo podhaiyila
parithaavam ival nilamai

paasamindru verumai
paasam kaatta thanthaikku
neramillai, enna kodumai

paasam thaedi alaindhaal
padhumai, kidakala
adhanaal podhaiku
ival adimai.

thozhi endra peril silaper
kadhalithu paar
ena moottivittu palaper

kadhalaithaal oruvanai
avanum nallavan illai
paavam enna seeivaal
ondrum ariyaadha
chinna pillai.

orunaal podhaiyila
porvaikkul pogayila
avanum anaithukolla
ivalum thadukkavilla

idhumattum indri
pala pengaludan thodarbu
kadaisiyil oru naal
idhu avalukku therindhu
sendraal prindhu
ivanai marandhu

kayavanin pasikindha
kuzhandhai virundhu
vilaivu
kadhal tholvi
ilavasa inaipaaga HIV

marana padukkayil
vazhkai therindhadhu.
seidha thavarai enni
manam ingu varundhudhu

padhinaaru vayadhinile
vazhkai mudiya vendumaa
kangalai moodinaal
iraivanidam vendinaal

iraivaa
enakkoru enakkoru
varam thaa
azhudhidum chinna
pillai naan
undhan kaigalil
yaendhi kolvaai (2)

orr naalil ethanai uravu
oru nodiyil
eththanai kanavu
kaanal neeraai
karaigirathe

vazhkayil kastam
varalaam
vazhve kastam endraal
iraivaa naanum
enna seiven.

kanneere kanneere
kadal pole
vazhindhadhe.

kastangal, nastangal
kannuku therikindradhe

ivan peyar Saravanan
vayadho ettu.
ivan kadhai kaettu
kelambittadhu
kanneer sottu.

sondha thaai thandhai
ivanai kai vittadhu.
natpaale kettadhu
kadaisiyil seththadhu

thandhai kudigaaran
thaai sariyillai pokku.
siru vayadhile
indha pinju nenjil
nanjai vidhaithu

samudhaayam odhutkida
thavaraana nanbargal
siruvayadhil podhaiku
adimaiyaagum siruvargal

varumai,
ivan thiramaiyai
kattipottadhu.
kalaigan aagum kanavi
vetti potadhu

kaikodukka yaarumillai
kayyil kooda kaasu illai
ayyo paavam enna seivaan
ivan chinna pillai.

nabarudan serndhukondu
seidhaan mudhal thiruttu.
panirendu vayadhil
ivan mela vazhakku.

irandu varudathula
ivan mella mell
maarinaan

padhi naangu vayathil
kolaikaaran aagiraan
kaasukkaa nanbane
kaatti kodukka

nadu roattil
vetti ivan
rendu uyirai parikka

naai adichu potaakooda
naalu peru ketpaanga
yaarum vandhu thookavilla
ketka oru naadhiyilla

maranap padukkayil
vazhkai therindhadhu
seidha thavarai enni
manam ingu varundhudhu

padhinaaru vayadhinile
vazhkai mudiya vendumaa.
kangalai moodinaan
iraivanidam vendinaan.

iraivaa
enakkoru enakkoru
varam thaa
azhudhidum chinna
pillai naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Iraiva?

The song Iraiva revolves around the journey of life and the various roles we play, conveying a motivational and inspirational message.

Who are the singers of Iraiva?

The song is sung by Chitra, Harini, and Hip Hop Tamizha.

When was Iraiva released?

The song was released on August 17, 2012.

What genre does Iraiva belong to?

Iraiva is a part of the hip hop genre, infused with motivational themes.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Iraiva from the album Hiphop Tamizhan is a motivational anthem that explores the journey of life. With lyrics that speak about the roles we play and the lessons we learn, it inspires listeners to embrace their paths. The energetic beats of Hip Hop Tamizha combined with the soulful voices of Chitra and Harini create a powerful and uplifting experience. This song is perfect for moments when you need a boost of motivation and energy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the powerful blend of Iraiva with the dynamic beats of Hip Hop Tamizha. This song, featuring the soulful voices of Chitra and Harini, captures the essence of life's journey. Dive into the motivational energy that Hiphop Tamizhan brings to your playlist.
stanzaMeanings: Yes, this life is a stage play, and we are the actors in it.
If this life is a book, then we are the lessons it teaches.
In this life, there are hundreds of stories, and I will tell you those stories. Listen, yeah.. yeah.. hip hop Tamizha Aadhi..
this one's for you, listen
Her name is Selvi, she went to study.
She didn't go to school, no focus on studies, no one to guide her, the reason is
She has no mother, her father is addicted, her situation is pitiful.
Without love, there's emptiness. The father has no time to show love, what a tragedy.
When she searched for love, she found trouble, so she became a slave to addiction.
Some people call themselves friends but deceive, many have been fooled.
She fell in love with someone, but he wasn't good. Poor girl, she doesn't know anything, she's just a little child.
One day, in a state of addiction, she went into a blanket of smoke, he didn't stop her, and she couldn't resist.
Not just with her, he had relationships with many girls. Eventually, she found out and left him, forgetting him.
A hungry child of a beggar, the result of love failure, free connection leads to HIV.
On the deathbed, life was understood. Regretting the mistakes made, the heart is in pain.
At sixteen, should life end? If you close your eyes and pray to God.
Oh God, give me a boon, a crying little child, I will hold your hands.
In one day, how many relationships, in one moment, how many dreams, they disappear like a mirage.
In life, troubles may come, if life itself is trouble, oh God, what will I do?
Tears, tears, flowed like the ocean.
Troubles, losses, are visible to the eyes.
His name is Saravanan, age eight. After hearing his story, he left with tears.
His own parents abandoned him. Betrayed by friendship, in the end, he died.
Father is an alcoholic, mother is not well. At a young age, they planted poison in his tender heart.
Society rejects, bad friends, at a young age, children become slaves to addiction.
Poverty tied up his talent. His dream of becoming an artist was shattered.
No one to lend a hand, not even money in hand. Oh, poor thing, what will this little boy do?
Joined with others, committed his first theft. At twelve, he had a case against him.
In two years, he slowly changed.
At fourteen, he became a murderer, for money, he betrayed a friend.
In the middle of the road, he took two lives.
Even if a dog is hit, four people will ask, but no one came to lift him, no one to ask.
On the deathbed, life was understood. Regretting the mistakes made, the heart is in pain.
At sixteen, should life end? If you close your eyes and pray to God.
Oh God, give me a boon, a crying little child, I will hold your hands.
